title: helianthus platycephalus
intro: Helianthus platycephalus, also known as the flat-topped sunflower, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, characterized by its flat-topped inflorescence and bright yellow petals. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helianthus platycephalus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
